cot_prefix: Okay, let's tackle this question. The user is asking about what happens if parents have trouble with their relationship, specifically what the child will do. Looking at the provided text, the relevant part is in the second paragraph. It says, "When parents are going through difficulties in their own relationship the child sometimes develops guilt. The child can hold himself or herself responsible for the breakdown in relationship between the parents." So the key point here is that the child might feel guilty and blame themselves for the parents' issues. The options are: A) will communicate with their parents B) will be responsible for the trouble C) will feel guilty about the trouble D) will help the parents recover Option
